workspace.title: Analysis Workspace
workspace.welcome: Welcome to your analysis workspace. Describe the analysis you'd like to perform.
workspace.processing: Processing your request. Results will be available shortly.
workspace.interpretationPlaceholder: The academic interpretation of your results will be generated here once the analysis is complete. It will include statistical significance, research implications, and recommendations.
dataPrep.consistency: Data is consistent — no issues detected
dataPrep.cleaningDesc: Auto cleaning imputes missing values (median/mode), removes duplicates, and handles outliers.
interpretation.title: Academic Interpretation
interpretation.sample.bachelor: The descriptive analysis results show significant trends in the data. The observed mean values are consistent with theoretical expectations. The statistical test indicates a significant relationship (p < 0.05) between the studied variables.
interpretation.sample.master: The analysis reveals statistically significant results. The coefficient of determination (R² = 0.78) indicates the model explains 78% of the variance. Regression coefficients are significant (p < 0.01), confirming the research hypothesis. These findings align with existing literature on the subject.
interpretation.sample.doctorate: The multivariate analysis results confirm the stated hypotheses. The structural model shows satisfactory fit (CFI = 0.95, RMSEA = 0.04). Direct and indirect effects are statistically significant, contributing to the advancement of knowledge in this research domain. These results call for in-depth discussion in connection with established theories.
interpretation.conclusionSample: In conclusion, this study has highlighted significant relationships between the studied variables. The research hypotheses are validated by the obtained statistical results.
interpretation.recommendationsSample: It is recommended to expand the sample to confirm these results and explore additional mediating variables in future research.
interpretation.noResults: Run analyses first to generate interpretations.
settings.profile.invalidFormat: Unsupported format. Use PNG, JPG or WEBP.

memoryAssistant.desc: Your intelligent assistant for writing and structuring your thesis.
memoryAssistant.writingDesc: Get suggestions to improve the writing quality of your thesis.
memoryAssistant.methodologyDesc: Receive recommendations on the research methodology suited to your topic.
memoryAssistant.structureDesc: Organize your thesis according to the academic standards of your institution.
memoryAssistant.bibliographyDesc: Manage your references and generate your bibliography in APA, Harvard, etc.
memoryAssistant.comingSoonDesc: The thesis assistant will soon be available with advanced AI features.

joel.subtitle: Your data analysis assistant
joel.redirectInfo: After creation, you'll be redirected to Assistant Joël
joel.greeting.morning: Good morning, I am Joël, your data analysis assistant.
joel.greeting.afternoon: Good afternoon, I am Joël, your data analysis assistant.
joel.greeting.evening: Good evening, I am Joël, your data analysis assistant.
joel.intro: Hello! I'm Joel, your research assistant. How can I help you?
joel.projectSummary: Here is a summary of your research project
joel.summary.title: Title
joel.askUpload: 📂 To get started, please upload your dataset.
joel.dropFile: Click or drop your file here
joel.fileReceived: ✅ File received! I'm analyzing your data structure...
joel.askAnalysis: 📊 Select the analyses you'd like to perform:
joel.analysisStarting: 🔬 Analysis in progress... Results will appear in the right panel.
joel.processing: Processing your request. One moment please...
joel.errorRateLimit: ⚠️ Too many requests. Please try again in a moment.
joel.errorCredits: ⚠️ Credits exhausted. Please top up your account.
joel.errorGeneric: ⚠️ An error occurred. Please try again.
joel.aiAnalysisPrompt: I uploaded the file {file}. Please perform the following analyses: {analyses}. Provide results with statistical tables, p-values, coefficients, and academic interpretation.
joel.aiInterpretationPrompt: Generate a comprehensive academic interpretation of the previous results, suitable for a thesis or dissertation. Include statistical significance, theoretical implications, and links to scientific literature.
joel.aiConclusionPrompt: Write a structured scientific conclusion based on the previous analysis results. It should be ready to integrate into an academic thesis or dissertation.
joel.aiRecommendationsPrompt: Provide research recommendations based on the previous analysis results. Include avenues for future research, methodological improvements, and practical implications.
joel.confirmQuestion: Would you like to continue with this information or modify the project details?
export.sampleInterpretation: The statistical analysis reveals significant results. The studied variables show relevant correlations for academic research. Statistical tests confirm the validity of the formulated hypotheses.
export.sampleConclusion: The results of this study confirm the research hypotheses. The analyzed data demonstrate significant trends that contribute to the existing academic literature.
export.sampleRecommendations: It is recommended to deepen the analysis with a larger sample. Complementary studies could explore the identified moderating variables.
export.generatedBy: Generated by Dr Data 2.0 — Assistant Joël
dataPrep.uploadFirst: Upload a file to start the analysis
joel.smartRecommendation: For a Bachelor's thesis in {domain}, descriptive statistics and cross-tabulations are recommended.
results.selectAnalysis: Select an analysis via the Assistant to see results
results.autoCategorized: Numeric variables were grouped into categories (Low, Medium, High).
results.expectedInParens: Expected values are shown in parentheses
charts.runAnalysis: Run an analysis to generate charts
notifications.title: Notifications
history.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The item will be permanently deleted.
